Class CorbaDeployer

java.lang.Object
org.apache.axis2.deployment.AbstractDeployer
org.apache.axis2.corba.deployer.CorbaDeployer
All Implemented Interfaces:
CorbaConstants, Deployer, DeploymentConstants
public class CorbaDeployer extends AbstractDeployer implements DeploymentConstants, CorbaConstants
